title: WorldBound:Refabricated
description: Improved world gen and some vanilla+ features.
body:
Worldbound:Refabricated is a fabric Vanilla+ modpack focused on worldGen, but, optmized. 
The modpack contains overhauled villagers, massive mountains and caves, and Tons of new biomes and structures. 
here we have a lot of mods, but here are the main mods:

-incendium
-luki's grand capitals
-stellarity
-oh the biomes we've gone
-biomes o' plenty
-terralith
-tectonic
-Luki's grand capitals

and for some optmisation we have: 

-chunky(optional)
-c2me
-sodium
-lithium
-fastload
-immediatelyfast
-indium

and, if you want, we have distant horizons too. 

prepare yourself for great adventures and a new minecraft experience with Worldbound:Refabricated!
